title: dianthus haematocalyx subsp. ventricosus
intro: Dianthus haematocalyx subsp. ventricosus, also known as the ventricose pink or fragrant pink, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Dianthus haematocalyx subsp. ventricosus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
